item.title: My garage, #1
item.author: Popov Yuri
item.description: This is my garage on the shelf as of January 22th: Land Rover Defender, Toyota Hilux, and disassembled Unimog. The 42082 (Rough Terrain Crane) is on the top shelf - it is going to be rebuilt soon into a full RC MOD.

item.title: Toyota Hilux
item.author: Popov Yuri
item.description:
This model was designed by RM8 LEGO Garage - BrickGarage. This was the first time I built not an original LEGO set, but someone’s model (MOC) from instructions. I really like the model, it looks beautiful on the shelf and at the same time has excellent playability.

I added custom LED lights (front and rear), modified the steering mechanism a bit (to fit a Chinese servo motor that can only turn 90°) and replaced regular LEGO cardan joints with the metal ones.

item.title: 42110 Land Rover Defender, v0.4
item.author: Popov Yuri
item.description: Logical continuation of 42110 Land Rover Defender chassis, v0.3 - finally everything is put together! I decided to move away from the original Land Rover bodywork and build something lighter and more attractive. I found this great MOC-35068 on Rebrickable which I based my solution on. The back door is sacrificed in favor of the strength of the body.
